chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4433 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No.18410/25 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18411/25 4. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025. Syed Dilshad Hussain Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner has made a complaint to SHO, PS Soldier Bazar, Karachi with information copies to I.G. Sindh Police, DIG (East) Karachi regarding harassment by the official respondents. I.G. Sindh Police is directed to look into the complaint of the petitioner, which is available at page-13 of the File, and after examining the same proceed with the same. A copy of this order shall be sent to I.G. Sindh Police alongwith complaint of the petitioner (Page-13 of the File) for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith all listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
